task.task_scale: synthetic downstream harness over a published Phase 2 checkpoint
task.held_out_policy: synthetic://toy is deterministic and not drawn from the SO-100 training silos; the harness evaluates the configured --num-episodes seed-pinned episodes derived from root_seed.
task.goal_policy: fixed synthetic goal clip generated by the built-in synthetic://toy world with seed 7919; no raw goal observation is serialized.

planner_budget.action_clipping: none in the current Planner path; sampled Gaussian actions are passed to the fresh local ActionHead, while ActionSpec bounds are recorded for audit.

eval_command: uv run --extra dev python scripts/phase2_eval_checkpoint.py --checkpoint-repo abdelstark/lensemble-phase2-so100-checkpoint --checkpoint-revision da52ef380ac87317c89e87f048d65bae65c16b9e --checkpoint-artifact-path artifacts/round-00003 --download-dir /tmp/lensemble-phase2-checkpoint --output /tmp/phase2_downstream_eval_report.json --expected-checkpoint-hash 8f1494fd9e57b7496daf96e379a3de1457a435080b81b9e0ea1d20a52f4827c4 --env-id synthetic://toy --planner icem --planning-samples 1 --horizon 1 --planner-iters 1 --num-episodes 2 --root-seed 0 --push --out-repo abdelstark/lensemble-phase2-so100-checkpoint --out-repo-type model --out-path reports/phase2_downstream_eval_report.json
claim_boundary: Compact engineering-scale downstream eval of a published Phase 2 checkpoint on the built-in synthetic://toy harness. It verifies checkpoint load, latent MPC execution, planner-cost reporting, and residency-safe EvalReport emission; it does not claim SO-100 task success or paper-scale LeWorldModel performance.
